msens 0.3.4

Add an msens cell tile layer to a mapgl map

Source: R/viz.R
add_cell_tiles.Rd

Viewport-driven XYZ tile alternative to add_cells(): the browser only fetches the tiles visible in the current viewport from the msens TiTiler factory, rather than shipping the whole raster as a base64-encoded image.

Usage

add_cell_tiles(
  m,
  tile_url,
  id = "r_lyr",
  source_id = "r_src",
  tile_size = 256,
  raster_opacity = 0.8,
  raster_resampling = "nearest",
  before_id = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

m

map or map_proxy

tile_url

character(1) XYZ tile URL template, typically from cell_tile_url() (must contain {z}/{x}/{y} placeholders)

id

layer id (default: "r_lyr")

source_id

source id (default: "r_src")

tile_size

numeric (default: 256)

raster_opacity

numeric (default: 0.8)

raster_resampling

character (default: "nearest")

before_id

layer to insert before

...

additional args to mapgl::add_raster_layer()

Value

map (pipeable)

On this page
